---
title: "data quality"
format: html
---
## Quick Data Summaries using `skimr` and `visudat`
```{r}
#| message: false
#| warning: false

library(skimr)
library(visdat)
library(readr)
library(dplyr)
library(tidyverse)
```

```{r}
#| message: false
#| warning: false

bg_chem <- read_csv('../data/BGchem2008data.csv')
```
```{r}
#Skim package `skim` function
skim(bg_chem)
```
